productDisplayName: Puma Women Minicats Knit Blue Cap
description: Composition Light blue knitted beanie made of 100% acrylic, has an embroidered cat logo on the back and embroidered brand name on the front and a small visor Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in wool washing cycle inside out with like colours in cool water, using a mild detergent Do not bleach or tumble dry Stretch to original shape while damp Cool iron inside out Do not dry clean Stay warm when the chill strikes in this light blue beanie from puma. The sleek cat logo embroidered on the cap and the embroidered brand name add interesting details to the cap. Perfect for casual wear.
